runnableItem.name: Mount CD-ROM
runnableItem.description: Mounts the CD-ROM of a virtual machine. If the virtual machine has no IDE controller and/or CD-ROM drive, the workflow creates them.

inputParameters.name: vm
inputParameters.description: Virtual machine to which to add a CD-ROM

inputParameters.name: connectAtPowerOn
inputParameters.description: Connect the CD-ROM when the virtual machine powers on
